_comment: Tests Ryde Health practitioner-due node 1: complaint-driven calls route to complaint_intake, booking language routes to book_intent, info questions route to info_pivot.

scenarios.name: Symptom-only call routes silently to complaint_intake

history.content: I've been having really bad lower back pain for the past couple of weeks

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='complaint_intake' with caller_complaint='lower back pain' (or similar) and zero spoken output. FAIL if agent routes to book_intent or info_pivot, or speaks before the tool call.

scenarios.name: Caller names a service — routes to book_intent not complaint_intake

history.content: I'd like to book a physiotherapy appointment

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='book_intent' with implied_service='physiotherapy' (or similar). FAIL if agent routes to complaint_intake — the caller named a service so no intake needed.

scenarios.name: Info question routes silently to info_pivot
scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='info_pivot' with zero spoken output and system__message_to_speak empty. FAIL if agent tries to answer the hours question inline or routes to complaint_intake.
